objective: Summarize a domain's backlink profile — read-only, no changes.

data.text: Give me a quick read-only summary of backlinks-fixture.example's backlink profile.

data.reply: backlinks-fixture.example backlink profile (read-only): 217 referring domains and 3,456 total backlinks, with a spam score of 7%. Nothing was changed.

toolOutputs.output: backlinks-fixture.example backlinks summary: referring_domains 217; backlinks 3456; backlinks_spam_score 7

finalAnswerText: backlinks-fixture.example backlink profile (read-only): 217 referring domains and 3,456 total backlinks, with a spam score of 7%. Nothing was changed.
